title: CISA Catalog of Known Exploited Vulnerabilities

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Log4j2 Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apache Log4j2 contains a vulnerability where JNDI features do not protect against attacker-controlled LDAP and other JNDI related endpoints.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache HTTP Server Path Traversal Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apache HTTP Server contains a path traversal vulnerability that can map URLs to files outside the directories configured by Alias-like directives, allowing remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache HTTP Server Path Traversal Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apache HTTP Server contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows an attacker to map URLs to files outside the expected document root.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Malformed catalog entry that must be skipped
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Entries without a valid CVE id are dropped rather than coerced.
